metadata.page_title: Harakoni Warhawks Imperial Guard Army List

special_rules.name: Commissars
special_rules.text:
An Imperial Guard army may include one Commissar character per 500 points, or part thereof, in the army. The Commissars do not cost any points.
Commissar units may be added to the army at the start of the battle before either side sets up. If the army includes a Supreme Commander than the first Commissar must be attached to the Supreme Commander's formation. Any further Commissars may be attached to any other formations.
You may not include more than one Commissar per formation. You may not add a Commissar to an Imperial Ally formation. If you have more Commissars than formations any excess is lost.

special_rules.name: Skyborne
special_rules.text: Harakoni Warhawks train extensively to function as rapid-deploying heavy infantry, acting as shock troops to open holes in an enemies defense. Warhawks use the Skitarii Hypaspists profile. Commanders, Sappers, and Fire Support teams gain a 5+ Armour Save. Fire Support teams replace both Autocannons with Lascannons. All infantry and Light Vehicles gain Planetfall. All Skimmers gain Planetfall.

special_rules.name: CAP Garrison
special_rules.text: Rather than placing one ground garrison on overwatch a Harakoni army may place one fighter formation on CAP. The player may still place as many ground garrisons as their army allows, but only one may start the game on overwatch. The fighters follow the setup rules for CAP, but this is done during the garrisoning phase of the pre-game setup.

special_rules.name: Air Cavalry
special_rules.text: Units in any Strike Company formation with assigned Valkyrie transports may use their transport slots as normal. Unless otherwise specified, light vehicles count as two models for the purposes of transport.

special_rules.name: Expendable
special_rules.text: Formations do not receive blast markers when Expendable units are killed, nor are they counted as casualties for assault resolution.

special_rules.name: Playtest Rule – Marauder Drop
special_rules.text: Marauder Heavy Bombers gain "Transport (1 formation consisting only of Infantry or Light Vehicles)". While transporting units, the Marauder is unable to use its Bomb Racks. Marauder Heavy Bombers are unable to conduct an Air-Assault, and can never load any troops after the game begins. When transported troops disembark from the Marauder during a Ground Attack action, the Bomber does not count as "landed," and Infantry or units with the Skimmer special rule may deploy as if they were equipped with Jump Packs.

formations.name: Harakoni Strike Company
formations.units_text: 1 Commander, 3 Warhawks, 2 Stormtroopers, and one of the listed formation options
formations.restrictions_or_notes: Choose one of: 4 Warhawks for +25 points; 3 Valkyries for +75 points, then add additional Valkyries up to the minimum required to transport the formation at +25 points each; or 2 Stormtroopers for free.
formations.raw_text: Harakoni Strike Company | 1 Commander, 3 Warhawks, 2 Stormtroopers, and one of the following: 4 Warhawks (+25 points), 3 Valkyries (must add additional Valkyries up to minimum required to transport formation at +25 each, +75 points), 2 Stormtroopers (free) | base 250 points

formations.name: 0-1 Regimental Command
formations.raw_text: 0-1 Regimental Command | Replace Commander with Supreme Commander | +100 points

formations.name: Fire Support
formations.raw_text: Fire Support | Add 4 Fire Support teams | +100 points

formations.name: Warhawk Infantry
formations.raw_text: Warhawk Infantry | Add 4 Warhawks to the formation | +75 points

formations.name: Harakoni Veterans
formations.raw_text: Harakoni Veterans | Add 2 Stormtroopers | +50 points

formations.name: Artillery Liaison Officer
formations.units_text: Add 1 Forward Observer character to a Warhawks base in the formation
formations.raw_text: Artillery Liaison Officer | Add 1 Forward Observer character to a Warhawks base in the formation | +100 points | 0-1 per 2000 points

formations.name: Grav-Glider
formations.raw_text: Grav-Glider | Add 1 Grav-Glider to the formation | +50 points

formations.name: Close Air Support
formations.units_text: Add 2 Vultures. Replace with Punishers for 50 points
formations.restrictions_or_notes: The source prints this as a replacement option rather than a split cost row.
formations.raw_text: Close Air Support | Add 2 Vultures. Replace with Punishers for 50 points | +125 points

formations.name: Reconnaissance Squadron
formations.restrictions_or_notes: May add 3 additional Sentinels for +50 points.
formations.raw_text: Reconnaissance Squadron | 6 Sentinels | 150 points | May add 3 additional Sentinels for +50 points

formations.name: Demolition Specialists
formations.units_text: Seven Sappers and one Tech Priest
formations.restrictions_or_notes: Add 4 Vendettas for +150 points. May add a Grav-Glider for +50 points.
formations.raw_text: Demolition Specialists | Seven Sappers and one Tech Priest | 200 points | add 4 Vendettas for +150 points; may add a Grav-Glider for +50 points

formations.name: Tank Hunter Squadron
formations.restrictions_or_notes: Add up to two additional Vultures or Vendettas for +75 points each. Replace up to two with Vulture Punishers for +25 points each.
formations.raw_text: Tank Hunter Squadron | Four Vultures or Vendettas | 300 points | Add up to two additional Vultures or Vendettas for +75 points each; replace up to two with Vulture Punishers for +25 points each

formations.name: Harakoni Light Artillery Squadron
formations.raw_text: Harakoni Light Artillery Squadron | Four Support Sentinels | 200 points | 0-1 per Reconnaissance Squadron

formations.name: Fighter Squadron
formations.units_text: Two Lightning Interceptors, Two Thunderbolts, or Two Lightning Strike Fighters
formations.restrictions_or_notes: May add up to two more Interceptors for +75 points. May replace any number with Thunderbolts or Lightning Strikes for +25 points each.
formations.raw_text: Fighter Squadron | Two Lightning Interceptors, Two Thunderbolts, or Two Lightning Strike Fighters | 150 points | May add up to two more Interceptors for +75 points; may replace any number with Thunderbolts or Lightning Strikes for +25 points each

profiles.name: Warhawks
abilities_or_notes: Skyborne: uses the Skitarii Hypaspists profile

profiles.name: Tech Priest
parse_warnings: The Tech Priest close-combat row is overlapped by adjacent OCR text; the visible 'Augmentations' assault weapon line was preserved conservatively and any extra traits beyond EA(+1) were not invented.
ambiguity_reasons: Tech Priest weapon row overlaps with the adjacent Sappers row in the PDF extraction.

profiles.name: Harakoni Fire Support
abilities_or_notes: Skyborne replaces both Autocannons with Lascannons
parse_warnings: The Fire Support firepower line is visibly degraded in the PDF extraction; the row clearly shows '2 x Lascannons' at 45cm, but the firepower was preserved as visible text 'AP5+' rather than normalized beyond the source.
ambiguity_reasons: Harakoni Fire Support firepower OCR is partially degraded.

profiles.name: Valkyrie
abilities_or_notes: May carry 2 Infantry, or 1 Light Vehicle

profiles.name: Grav-Glider
abilities_or_notes: May carry 12 of the following units: Warhawks, Commanders, Supreme Commanders, Stormtroopers, Forward Observer, Fire Support, Tech-Priest, Sappers, all Sentinels. All Light Vehicles take up 2 spaces each.

profiles.name: Chimera
abilities_or_notes: May carry up to 2 Imperial Guard Infantry

profiles.name: Lightning Interceptor
parse_warnings: The Lightning Interceptor firepower text is partially reordered by OCR; the visible row was preserved conservatively as Lightning Autocannon AA5+ FxF and Wingtip Lascannons AT6+/AA5+ FxF.
ambiguity_reasons: Lightning Interceptor firepower tokens are partially reordered in the extracted text.

profiles.name: Marauder Heavy Bomber
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Engines seriously damaged, aircraft crashes
Transport (1 formation consisting only of Infantry or Light Vehicles) while using the Marauder Drop playtest rule
While transporting units, Bomb Racks may not be used

profiles.name: Marauder Destroyer
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Engines seriously damaged, aircraft crashes

profiles.name: Marauder Spectre
abilities_or_notes: Critical Hit Effect: Engines seriously damaged, aircraft crashes

profiles.name: Lunar Class Cruiser
parse_warnings: The Lunar Class Cruiser row is visibly collapsed in the PDF extraction; Orbital Bombardment and Pin-Point Attack were separated conservatively from the rendered table.
ambiguity_reasons: Lunar Class Cruiser weapon labels and firepower tokens are partially concatenated by OCR.

profiles.name: Emperor Class Battleship
abilities_or_notes: Slow and Steady-ish (may not be used on turn one of a battle unless the scenario specifically says otherwise)

profiles.name: Onero Overflight
abilities_or_notes: May carry up to 20 Skimmers and any troops transported on them, as well as any number of units with GravChutes
parse_warnings: The Onero Overflight row is partially reordered by OCR; the visible rendered table confirms a Transport note and a '2x Pin-Point Attack' weapon line at '4x AT4+'.
ambiguity_reasons: Onero Overflight weapon row is partially reordered in the extracted text.

army_notes.name: Strike Companies
army_notes.text: A Harakoni army may contain any number of Strike Companies.

army_notes.name: Company Upgrades
army_notes.text: Up to three upgrades may be added to each Strike Company.

army_notes.name: Support Formations
army_notes.text: Two support formations may be taken for each company.

army_notes.name: Imperial Allies
army_notes.text: Up to one third of army points may be spent on Imperial Allies formations.

army_notes.name: OCR Note
army_notes.text: The PDF OCR was messy and page 1 and page 2 rows were cross-checked against the rendered PDF table before normalizing the source JSON.

extraction_warnings: Source extracted from the local PDF C:/Users/fliff/Downloads/Harakoni Warhawks v1.4.2.pdf via pypdf plain-text and layout extraction.
source_url was left null because no reliable Harakoni Warhawks source URL was confirmed from the repository during this task.

The PDF text extraction is messy and several page 1 and page 2 rows were partially reordered or overlapped; the JSON was cross-checked against the visible rendered table and ambiguous rows were preserved conservatively with parse warnings.

The Commissars rule text was reused from war/source-json/mobile-catachans.json because the Harakoni PDF references the standard Imperial Guard Commissars special rule rather than reprinting the full text.

The Leman Russ Conqueror profile was reused from war/source-json/elysian-drop-troops.json because the Harakoni list references Conquerors in Linebreaker Relief Column but the profile table does not reprint a separate Conqueror row.
Linebreaker Relief Column was normalized from source OCR 'Linebreaker Relief Coloumn'; the raw_text preserves the original wording.
The Spacecraft row was split into three explicit formation entries for Onero Overflight, Lunar Cruiser, and Emperor Battleship because the source prints one-of alternatives with distinct costs.
The Fighter Squadron row preserves the available fighter choices and replacement text as restrictions_or_notes rather than collapsing them into a single invented profile.
